source_finding: The GitHub repository contains README only. The release asset is a Windows RAR package with GUI executables, WebDriver/WindowsDriver, platform icons, image assets, and configuration templates.
license_boundary: README says AGPL-3.0 and commercial use requires contacting the author. No AGPL code is copied into our product.

platforms.display_name: 抖音私信 / 抖店飞鸽
aijiakefu_claim: README claims support for 抖音私信
README claims support for 抖店
release_evidence: Tool/config.yaml contains individual.抖音 and individual.抖店
platforms.official_route: Douyin Open Platform private-message scopes, enterprise IM webhooks, or Douyin shop/Feige official/service-provider permissions after account authorization.
platforms.rpa_research_route: Visible browser or desktop customer-service workspace, operator already logged in, draft-only fill and immediate clear if required.

platforms.official_route: Taobao customer-service panel plugin, service market app, or customer-service tool permissions after platform review.
platforms.rpa_research_route: Qianniu desktop/web customer-service surface, operator already logged in, draft-only fill.
